hooks.command: if [ -f .worktree.log ]; then tail -80 .worktree.log | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: ("[worktree-log]\n" + .)}}'; fi; printf '%s [%s] * start\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" >> .worktree.log
P=$(jq -r '.prompt[:300] | gsub("\n"; " ")'); printf '%s [%s] > %s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" "$P" >> .worktree.log

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$CMD" in 'git commit'*|'git push'*|'git merge'*) printf '%s [%s] $ %.100s\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)" "$CMD" >> .worktree.log ;; esac
